title: On an integrable 2+1-dimensional extended Dym equation: Lax pair, $\bar{\partial}$-dressing scheme and modulation
author_string: Boris Konopelchenko, Colin Rogers, Pablo Amster
abstract: In 1+1-dimensions, an extension of the canonical solitonic Dym equation has previously been derived both in a geometric torsion evolution context and in the analysis of peakon solitonic phenomena in hydrodynamics. Here, a novel 2+1-dimensional S-integrable extended Dym-type equation is introduced. As Lax pair is constructed and an associated $\bar{\partial}$-dressing scheme detailed. Integrable modulated versions of the 2+1-dimensional extended Dym equation are generated via application of a class of involutory transformations with genesis in classical Ermakov theory.
